overall.description: Gameplay footage from Black Myth: Wukong showing the protagonist Sun Wukong riding a flying cloud through a dramatic mountainous landscape at dusk. The character navigates through rocky peaks, dense forests, and misty valleys with cinematic third-person camera work.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river canyon with ancient stone ruins

events.description: begins gentle ascent while following the river path

agents.ego_description: flying on a cloud staff low over a river, passing between stone ruins and forested banks

entered.detail: dark reflective water flowing through the canyon bottom
ancient weathered stone walls lining the riverbank
dense evergreen trees covering the canyon slopes
steep rock face rising above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-altitude flight through a narrow forested canyon. The character travels above a dark river, flanked by ancient stone ruins and dense pine forests on both sides. The camera follows smoothly as the character begins a gentle ascent, with rocky cliffs visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain peaks with sparse vegetation

events.description: sharp ascent between towering cliff faces
entering misty cloud layer between mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: steeply ascending through rocky mountain peaks, navigating between close cliff faces while gaining altitude

entered.detail: massive vertical rock wall passing close on the left
ancient pagoda-like structure perched on distant peak
dark dramatic clouds gathering between peaks

segments.scene_description: The character ascends steeply through a dramatic mountain pass, with massive rocky cliffs passing closely on both sides. The river and ruins fall away below as the camera rises into more open air, revealing a distant temple structure and dramatic cloud formations between the peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense mountain forest with rocky outcrops

events.description: banking left to navigate around large rock formation
flying close to cliff face temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense forest and rocky outcrops, maintaining medium altitude while navigating the terrain

entered.detail: moss-covered boulder formation rising from the forest
narrow gap between forested peaks ahead
deep valley with mist settling in the lower areas

segments.scene_description: Flying through a dense mountain forest, the character navigates around large mossy rock formations and through narrow passes. The terrain becomes more enclosed with trees and rocks passing close by, while mist settles in the valleys below. The camera banks and weaves to follow the winding path through the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive mountain valley with panoramic views

events.description: slight descent while accelerating over forest canopy

agents.ego_description: flying high over vast forest canopy with panoramic views of distant mountain ranges

entered.detail: layered mountain ridges stretching to the horizon
unbroken sea of treetops covering the valley floor
low-lying fog drifting through the lower valleys

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide panoramic view as the character flies high above an expansive forest canopy. Distant mountain ranges layer the horizon while valley mist drifts through lower areas. The camera maintains a smooth, sweeping motion over the treetops, showcasing the vast scale of the natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a secluded, forested river canyon into the open heights of a dramatic mountain pass. It begins with a low-altitude flight above a dark river, gliding past ancient stone ruins and dense pine forests that flank the narrow waterway. As the character begins a gentle climb, the camera follows the upward trajectory toward distant rocky cliffs. The scene then shifts into a steep ascent through a narrow pass where massive cliffs press in from both sides, causing the river and ruins to fall away below. Finally, the camera rises into the open air, revealing a distant temple structure nestled among dramatic cloud formations between the peaks.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic flight through a dense mountain forest into a vast, sweeping aerial panorama. It begins by weaving through narrow passes and around large mossy rock formations, with trees and cliffs passing closely as the camera banks to follow the winding terrain. As the character navigates through these enclosed spaces, mist settles in the valleys below, creating a sense of depth within the rugged landscape. The scene then opens abruptly into a wide view as the camera ascends high above the expansive forest canopy. Finally, the motion becomes a smooth, sweeping glide over the treetops, revealing layered mountain ranges on the horizon and drifting valley mist that emphasizes the immense scale of the wilderness.
